Interface IDEGeoDataset

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return information about a geographic dataset data element.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("5ED64E50-A2F2-11D5-931B-0080C71A3226")]
public interface IDEGeoDataset

Properties

Extent

The extent of the coverage.

IEnvelope Extent { get; set; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

The spatial reference of the geodataset.

ISpatialReference SpatialReference { get; set; }
